name: Suspicious Double Extension Detected
description: Detection of a file with a suspicious double extension (e.g., `.docx.exe`). Adversaries often use double extensions to masquerade as a benign file type, such as a document, to trick users into executing a malicious file, which is a common defense evasion technique.

prompts.prompt: An alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious process, **{process}**, with a double file extension was detected in the command line: **{command}**. This is a strong indicator of **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1036.007**), where an adversary is attempting to masquerade as a benign file to trick a user into executing malicious code. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious file. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: process
parameters.description: The name of the suspicious process.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
